Question:
We will perform a Cox regression. Include participants who reported yes to a self-reported diabetes question.
1999-2010 NHANES data will be used. Exclude participants with no self reported diabetes, <18 year old, and months followup examination missing, red cell distribution missing, mortality information missing.
Predictor is red cell distribution, categorized in quartiles (Q1: <= 25%, Q2: <25 and <=50%, Q3: <50 and <=75%, Q4: >75%) 
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
Adjust for age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin. and hemoglobin.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2010

Inclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diabetes = Yes

Exclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diabetes ≠ Yes
- age at screening < 18
- months followup examination missing
- red cell distribution missing
- mortality information missing

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin
- hemoglobin

Predictor:
- red cell distribution categorized in quartiles:
  Q1: <= 25%
  Q2: >25% and <=50%
  Q3: >50% and <=75%
  Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months followup examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;

FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.diq_b
UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.diq_c
UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.diq_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq;

CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."red_cell_distribution_width",
    t4."mortality_status",
    t5."gender",
    t6."race_hispanic_origin",
    t7."hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include participants who reported yes to self-reported diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with no self-reported diabetes ("No" or "Borderline")
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants age at screening < 18
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 18;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing red cell distribution
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."red_cell_distribution_width" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants with missing mortality information
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Hemoglobin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hemoglobin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5 Red cell distribution (raw values)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 Compute quartile cutoffs for red cell distribution within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution") AS q3
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution;

-- 4.7 Assign red cell distribution quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1'
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2'
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3'
    ELSE 'Q4'
  END AS "red_cell_distribution"
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution;

-- 4.8 Time-to-event: months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_time_to_event AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."months_followup_examination" AS "time_to_event_months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.9 Event indicator: all-cause mortality
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_event_indicator AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."mortality_status" AS "event_indicator_all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Output ==========

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT 
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  a."age_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  h."hemoglobin",
  q."red_cell_distribution",
  t."time_to_event_months_followup_examination",
  e."event_indicator_all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_at_screening a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_hemoglobin h ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = h."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles q ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = q."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_time_to_event t ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = t."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_event_indicator e ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = e."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
